Webinars

o 	Audio conferencing via phone and computer
o 	Records full webinar
o 	Instantly change presenters
o 	Chat and survey capabilities
o 	Post event reports

o 	Meet with up to 200 participants
o 	Screen sharing capabilities
o 	Video conferencing up to 6 people
o 	Offers full webinar recording
o 	Ability to interact with audience through polls and chat
o 	PayPal integration for delivering paid webinars

Market Research Tools
o 	Alexa: Provides useful data on a website’s traffic levels, visitor demographics,
and search engine behavior.
o 	Compete: Free version allows you to gather important website traffic data and
shows how you stack up against your competition.
o 	Aboutus.org: Great resource for gathering basic competitor website information
and contact details.
o 	DomainTools: Useful for finding technical data on a particular website (i.e. host
information).
o 	Website Grader: Analyzes a website’s traffic levels, SEO results, and social
media reach.
o 	SEMRush: Free version provides useful pay-per-click and organic search
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
